mapper.sql: id, title, content, draft_title, draft_content, post_type, created_at, updated_at, draft_updated_at, view_count, status
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO posts(user_id, title, content, draft_title, draft_content, post_type) values( #{post.userID}, #{post.title}, #{post.content}, #{post.title}, #{post.content}, #{post.postType} )
mapper.select: select from posts where user_id=#{userID} and id=#{articleId}
mapper.update: UPDATE posts SET draft_title = #{p.draftTitle}, draft_content = #{p.draftContent}, draft_updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{p.userID} and id = #{p.id}
